DEVOTED-FAITH_POWER.description: When at 10 or above [gold]Faith[/gold], lose 10 [gold]Faith[/gold] and gain 5 [gold]Vigor[/gold]
DEVOTED-FAITH_POWER.smartDescription: When at 10 or above [gold]Faith[/gold], lose 10 [gold]Faith[/gold] and gain 5 [gold]Vigor[/gold]
DEVOTED-FAITH_POWER.title: Faith
DEVOTED-DEVOTION_POWER.description: Modify the starting value of Faith when it is triggered by [gold]Devotion[/gold].
DEVOTED-DEVOTION_POWER.smartDescription: Modify the starting value of Faith when it is triggered by [gold]Devotion[/gold].
DEVOTED-DEVOTION_POWER.title: Devotion
DEVOTED-ZEAL_POWER.description: Modify the amount of [gold]Vigor[/gold] gained from triggering [gold]Faith[/gold] by the amount of [gold]Zeal[/gold] one has.
DEVOTED-ZEAL_POWER.smartDescription: Modify the amount of [gold]Vigor[/gold] gained from triggering [gold]Faith[/gold] by the amount of [gold]Zeal[/gold] one has.
DEVOTED-ZEAL_POWER.title: Zeal
DEVOTED-PENANCE_FAITH_POWER.description:
Whenever you take unblocked attack damage, gain [blue]X[/blue] [gold]Faith[/gold].
Then reduce this amount by 1.
DEVOTED-PENANCE_FAITH_POWER.smartDescrip:
Whenever you take unblocked attack damage, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Faith[/gold].
Then reduce this amount by 1.
DEVOTED-PENANCE_FAITH_POWER.title: Penance: Faith
DEVOTED-PENANCE_RETRIBUTION_POWER.descri:
Whenever you take unblocked attack damage, Deal [blue]X[/blue] damage to the attacker.
Then reduce this amount by 1.
DEVOTED-PENANCE_RETRIBUTION_POWER.smartD:
Whenever you take unblocked attack damage, Deal [blue]{Amount}[/blue] damage to the attacker.
Then reduce this amount by 1.
DEVOTED-PENANCE_RETRIBUTION_POWER.title: Penance: Retribution
DEVOTED-PENANCE_DRAW_POWER.description:
Whenever you take unblocked attack damage, draw [blue]X[/blue] additional cards next turn.
Then reduce this amount by 1.
DEVOTED-PENANCE_DRAW_POWER.smartDescript:
Whenever you take unblocked attack damage, draw [blue]{Amount}[/blue] additional cards next turn.
Then reduce this amount by 1.
DEVOTED-PENANCE_DRAW_POWER.title: Penance: Draw
DEVOTED-PENANCE_ENERGY_POWER.description:
Whenever you take unblocked attack damage, gain [blue]X[/blue] energy next turn.
Then reduce this amount by 1.
DEVOTED-PENANCE_ENERGY_POWER.smartDescri:

Then reduce this amount by 1.
DEVOTED-PENANCE_ENERGY_POWER.title: Penance: Energy
DEVOTED-PENANCE_RAGE_POWER.description:
Whenever you take unblocked attack damage, gain [blue]X[/blue] Vigor.
Then reduce this amount by 1.

DEVOTED-PENANCE_HEAL_POWER.description: When a [gold]Penance[/gold] is triggered, heal [blue]X[/blue] and then reduce this value by 1.
